description: STUB — reserves the schema code for Phase G8 (Submission Form Customization). The full definition (field types, validation rules, applicablePaths, displayOrder, label_ptMZ/label_en, dependent-list semantics) is designed in docs/g-phases/g8-submission-forms.md and will be fleshed out when the G8 implementation PR lands. Registered as an empty-shape object so the schema code is reserved in the registry and downstream tooling can reference `CRS.SubmissionFormField` without colliding. DO NOT seed data against this schema yet — the shape will change before the implementation PR ships.
